parameters.query:
-- Get contacts enrolled in Alumni Reconnect campaign with LinkedIn URL
-- that haven't been exported to HeyReach yet
-- Prioritize VIP titles first
WITH vip_titles AS (
  SELECT id
  FROM contacts
  WHERE job_title ILIKE ANY(ARRAY[
    '%VP%', '%Vice President%', '%Director%', '%Chief%', 
    '%Head of%', '%SVP%', '%EVP%', '%C-Level%', '%CEO%', '%CFO%', '%COO%', '%CHRO%'
  ])
)
SELECT 
  c.id as contact_id,
  c.email,
  c.first_name,
  c.last_name,
  c.company,
  c.job_title,
  c.linkedin_url,
  cc.id as campaign_contact_id,
  CASE WHEN v.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as is_vip
FROM contacts c
JOIN campaign_contacts cc ON c.id = cc.contact_id
LEFT JOIN campaign_contact_channels ccc ON ccc.campaign_contact_id = cc.id 
  AND ccc.campaign_channel_id = 'cc111111-2222-3333-4444-555566667777'
LEFT JOIN vip_titles v ON v.id = c.id
WHERE cc.campaign_id = 'a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890'
  AND cc.status = 'active'
  AND c.linkedin_url IS NOT NULL
  AND c.linkedin_url != ''
  AND ccc.id IS NULL  -- Not yet assigned to LinkedIn channel
ORDER BY is_vip DESC, c.created_at ASC
LIMIT 50  -- Smaller batch due to LinkedIn limits

=-- Create campaign_contact_channels records for LinkedIn/HeyReach
INSERT INTO campaign_contact_channels (campaign_contact_id, campaign_channel_id, status)
VALUES 
  {{ $json.values }}
ON CONFLICT (campaign_contact_id, campaign_channel_id) DO UPDATE SET
  status = 'pending',
  updated_at = NOW()

=-- Log export activity
INSERT INTO campaign_activity (campaign_contact_id, campaign_channel_id, activity_type, channel, metadata)
SELECT 
  unnest(ARRAY{{ JSON.stringify($('Prepare Channel Insert').first().json.contact_ids.map(c => c.campaign_contact_id)) }}::uuid[]),
  'cc111111-2222-3333-4444-555566667777'::uuid,
  'sent',
  'linkedin',
  jsonb_build_object(
    'export_batch', '{{ $now.toISO() }}',
    'total_in_batch', {{ $('Prepare Channel Insert').first().json.count }},
    'vip_count', {{ $('Prepare Channel Insert').first().json.vip_count }},
    'platform', 'heyreach'
  )

parameters.jsonOutput:
={
  "success": true,
  "exported_count": {{ $('Prepare Channel Insert').first().json.count }},
  "vip_count": {{ $('Prepare Channel Insert').first().json.vip_count }},
  "timestamp": "{{ $now.toISO() }}",
  "campaign": "Alumni Reconnect Q1 2026",
  "platform": "heyreach"
}
